details.test: Task 1: Add two post-2018 digital albums under $15 by different artists to cart
Task 2: Add three vinyl LPs from 1960s, 1970s, 1980s under $30 to cart
Task 3: Purchase two cheapest GA tickets for earliest Chicago show after 2025-07-01
Task 4: Sign up for weekly emails about new vinyl releases
Task 5: Create 5-track playlist with female vocals, live, and long tracks
Task 6: Bookmark a post-2023 analog recording blog article into Studio Articles list
Task 7: Add three of the cheapest blue T-shirt in size L to cart
Task 8: Choose best-value Midnight Crossroads CD edition under $25 and add it to cart
Task 9: Send a demo inquiry contact message
